title: The Hated Classmate
overview: Akane copes with her trauma by being popular and working hard to make people like her, but one boy in her class doesn’t care about her at all. That bothers her to no end.

title: Shadow Garden Is Born
overview: Reincarnated as the son of Baron Kagenou, Cid bides his time as Background Character A while preparing for the day he can finally become the Eminence in Shadow!

title: Fencer Ordinaire
overview: The princess is supposed to reject the background character’s confession, not accept it — since when did Cid become a rom-com protagonist?

title: Sadism's Rewards
overview: The mistake those with power always make is believing that they are the ones in control.

title: I Am...
overview: Cid is not facing a minion but a would-be Knight of the Rounds. Normally, that is cause for concern, but an atomic bomb has no reason to fear the gnashing of a lowly pest.

title: Pretenders
overview: While Iris seeks a bright mind to study an artifact, Cid visits a popular store. Meanwhile, in the dark corners of the city, someone commits murders in Shadow Garden’s name!

title: A Fencing Tournament of Intrigue and Bloodshed
overview: Cid gets a report from Nu about powerful cult members lurking in the Royal Capital. Too bad he’s too distracted about the upcoming fencing tournament to notice.

title: Dark Knight Academy Under Attack
overview: Cid sacrificed his life to save Rose. At least, that’s what everyone thinks. Unbeknownst to anyone else, Cid survived exactly as planned, and now his counterattack can begin.

title: The End of a Lie
overview: When the students fight back, Shadow Garden joins the fray as their reinforcements. Amidst the chaos, Cid confronts the Gaunt Knight.

title: The Sacred Land, City of Deception
overview: Cid heads to Lindwurm in response to a summons from Alpha, but he is not the only one traveling there; the annual Goddess’ Trial is quickly approaching.

title: The Goddess' Trial
overview: The curtain rises on the Goddess’ Trial. When Cid is unwittingly called into the arena, he transforms into Shadow and faces none other than Aurora, the Witch of Calamity.

title: The Truth Within the Memories
overview: The door to the Sanctuary opens and Alpha strides through it, intending to expose the Cult’s grave secrets. Meanwhile, Cid also enters the Sanctuary and reunites with… Aurora?

title: A Bloody Showdown as an Offering to Annihilation
overview: Alpha faces off against an empowered Nelson in a vicious battle. Elsewhere, Cid and Aurora reach the Sanctuary's core, but a door only a hero can open blocks their path.

title: Your Lie, Your Wish
overview: Cid’s victory is short-lived when Nelson counters with his new magic. Meanwhile, Alexia convinces Rose and Natsume to form an alliance to uncover the truth of their world.

title: The Strongest Weakest Man
overview: Only the strongest warriors can advance in the prestigious Bushin Festival, but one contestant proves himself a feeble and mundane man with no talent. Why is he competing?

title: Unseen Intentions
overview: Princess Rose flees to the north of the Royal Capital. The Oriana Kingdom wants to handle it internally as a “purely domestic” matter.

title: Moonlight That Pierces the Darkness
overview: Cid recollects piano lessons from his past life — what impact does this have on his present? Meanwhile, Epsilon’s performance sets the soundtrack for something else...

title: Betting on a Moment
overview: Cid and Claire receive an invitation to a tournament. At the festivities, Cid receives more attention than a background character desires.

title: Dancing Puppet
overview: Doem tries to make war with Midgar. Meanwhile, the match between Jimina and Iris begins.

title: Advent of the Demon
overview: Provoked by the fight between Shadow and Beatrix, Iris joins the fray. An intense battle progresses across the Royal Capital. Meanwhile, Rose runs into Alpha...

title: The Lawless City
overview: Cid and his sister Claire venture to the huge slum known as the “Lawless City.” There, Cid gets caught up in the commotion caused by the Red Moon.

title: The Haven
overview: The moon is red. The frenzy has begun. Shadow is introduced to power players in Lawless City. Meanwhile, Mary and Claire run into Juggernaut.

title: The Hour of Awakening
overview: The night the red moon rises, the Blood Queen Elisabeth makes her return.

title: Mask of Falsehood
overview: The Mitsugoshi Company is doing great, all thanks to Gamma! However, the biggest crisis imaginable rears its ugly head.

title: He Who Pulls the Strings
overview: Alpha and Gamma carefully plot not take any actions that would implicate Mitsugoshi's connection to Shadow Garden. Meanwhile, John Smith has a plot of his own.

title: John Smith
overview: John Smith's skill is leagues above even the most skilled fighters! Who is this mysterious person?

title: Something Precious
overview: The Major Corporate Alliance has forced closure of all their storefronts, bringing the citizens' unrest to its peak. But can Shadow Garden weather the storm?

title: The Dragon’s Tears
overview: With Cid missing and things getting hot, the Shadow Garden springs into action. At the Mitsugoshi Hot Springs Land that is!

title: The Key
overview: On the way to the Kingdom of Oriana, Cid is also on a journey of self-discovery and reflection. He feels like something's missing. Is he imagining it?

title: Caged Bird
overview: Did Princess Rose Oriana take it upon herself to join up with the enemy? Not even the Seven Shadows have authority over this matter anymore.

title: Determination
overview: With Princess Rose’s hands tied as Perv has taken her mother hostage, the Eminence in Shadow must move to free the captive himself.

title: HIGHEST
overview: Let the banquet of slaughter begin in the season finale.
